title: Spanish Peppadew Frittata
description: A flavorful and colorful omelette-style dish featuring peppers and crumble. Great for a quick brunch or breakfast.
instructions: Chop the peppers and cook in a pan with some oil until tender
In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs and add crumble
Add the cooked peppers and peppadew peppers to the bowl and mix
Pour the egg mixture into a greased baking dish
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the eggs are set
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before slicing
